_observed: FALSE-REJECT FIXTURE (calibration 2026-06-07). A real RAW English Neo Discovery Poliwrath #9 holo (Graded='No', top-level condition 'Ungraded', Card Number '9/75', Language English) that the verified-listing resolver WRONGLY rejected as graded for an ANY_RAW request, because the listing carries a stray 'Grade'='9' aspect (the CARD NUMBER leaking into eBay's Grade field) and detectGraded treated any 'Grade' aspect as a slab. The fix: an explicit Graded='No' / 'Ungraded' vetoes a bare Grade aspect. This listing MUST be detected as RAW and pass ANY_RAW. Captured live via the certification sweep (scripts/audit-resolver.ts, deleted after). Sibling candidate in the same search carried Grade='Heavily Played (Poor)' (a condition phrase, not a grade) — also raw. See docs/calibration-resolver-2026-06.md certification addendum.
title: Poliwrath Neo Discovery 9 Unlimited Ultra Holo Rare Pokémon TCG
